name: Pita Pizzas
recipeIngredient: Boneless, skinless chicken breasts (half pound), cut into 1/2 inch cubes
Red bell peppers (half cup), thinly sliced
Red onion (about 1 small onion), thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a medium nonstick skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium heat. Add chicken cubes and cook, stirring, for 6 minutes or until browned and no longer pink in the center. Remove chicken from the skillet.
3. Return the skillet to the heat and spray again with cooking spray. Add bell peppers, mushrooms, onion, garlic, basil, and oregano. Cook, stirring, for 5 to 7 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender. Return chicken to the skillet and stir well.
4. Place spinach on top of the pita breads. Divide the chicken and vegetable mixture evenly over the spinach. Sprinkle mozzarella and Parmesan cheese evenly over the pizzas.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 7 to 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted. Makes 6 servings. Calories: 158 | Diabetic Choices: 1 Starch, 2 Protein, 1/2 Vegetable | Fat: 3g, Dietary Fiber: 4g
